prompt: Create a realistic premium Japanese café product photograph of an anime-themed kakigori dessert inspired by Char Aznable from Mobile Suit Gundam. Scene: a dark luxurious sci-fi themed café interior at night, with warm amber lighting, black lacquered tabletop, a window showing outer space and a blue planet on the left, a red vertical banner with a black Zeon-style emblem in the background, and a seated uniformed officer figure in the rear wearing a white horned helmet and red military jacket with gold trim; the face should be intentionally obscured by a soft rectangular blur. Center foreground: one oversized bowl of shaved ice kakigori in a glossy black bowl printed with a white Zeon emblem and the word “ZEON,” sitting on a round black-and-red tray with a spoon. Dessert details: a tall mound of crystalline shaved ice covered in vivid red berry syrup, whole raspberries and cranberries, sliced strawberries on the right side, glossy white condensed-milk drizzle, a generous spiral of pale whipped cream on top, fine edible glitter, small gold star sprinkles, a red translucent star ornament, and a gold chocolate crest ornament with a Zeon-like emblem. Include one small glass carafe of red syrup on the right. On the left, place one upright dark brown menu/explanation plate with ornate gold border and Japanese typography. The sign must contain these visible text sections: top line “季節限定,” main title “シャア専用 赤い彗星かき氷,” subtitle “〜赤き氷壁、エースの誇り〜,” an emblem divider, exactly five bullet ingredients “赤いベリーシロップ,” “いちごコンポート,” “ラズベリーソース,” “練乳エスプーマ,” “ホワイトチョコレート,” a short descriptive paragraph, price “¥2,200(税込),” and café name “雪月茶寮” with small roman text “SETSUGETSU SARYO.” Style: hyper-realistic commercial food photography, premium limited-edition dessert advertisement, shallow depth of field, crisp focus on the kakigori, rich reds and blacks, cinematic lighting, high detail in ice crystals and syrup reflections. Customizable subject slots: café name 雪月茶寮, main dessert title シャア専用 赤い彗星かき氷, price ¥2,200(税込), emblem word on bowl ZEON, background character style white horned helmet and red military uniform. Constraints: include exactly one dessert bowl, one menu plate, one spoon, one syrup carafe, one red banner, and one blurred background character; no extra logos beyond the fictional Zeon-style marks; keep all Japanese sign text legible and placed on the left plate.
